text_block_list.text:
After a training session I saw Seiun Sky looking 
at something on her phone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haa… Such a comfy design, and that cute, curly tail…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
For this perfect gem to fit in the palm of my hand, 
this truly is the perfect form of therapy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: More importantly, Trainer-san, are you free on your next day off?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of getting a new pair of shoes and was wondering 
if you'd like to come and look at some with me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Great, then let's go to the mall this weekend!

On my next day off, Seiun Sky and I went to a shopping mall 
that had a sports store.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, now where's that sporting goods store at…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh…?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nothing, I just saw something intriguing is all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Isn't that mug in that store over there super cute?

When I looked to where she was pointing, 
I noticed a mug with a cat painted on it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haa… The cat on that mug looks so comfy, 
like it's about to fall asleep.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'd feel much more motivated if I could have a cup of tea 
out of it before every training session.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What should I do…? Should I buy it…? Oh!?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer-san, look over there!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It says, "buy two mugs and get a cat-shaped keyholder for free!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize this before, but if I buy two mugs I'd also 
get that super cute cat-shaped keyholder too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's great value! I want them both so bad!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I wouldn't have a use for two mugs… Hmm…
After thinking about it for some time, Seiun Sky said…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, I've got it…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer-san, I've got a completely 
unrelated question to ask you…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer-san… Do you happen to own a mug?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If I remember correctly, I'm pretty sure you don't have one.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? I have no idea what you're talking about.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We just happened to pass by here, and 
just so happened to see that mug with 
the cute cat on it that I want.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You seem like the type of person to use mugs… 
Plus, if you don't have one, now's the perfect 
time to get one, doncha think?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on now, imagine this. Right before 
training, you and your horsegirl are both 
drinking tea out of matching mugs…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Symbolizing the deep bond between us… 
Wouldn't that be wonderful?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Plus, I know for a fact it would help make me feel more pumped for training… Glance glance.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, now that's my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're pretty good at making sure your horsegirl's motivation 
is always as high as can be, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now then, why don't we each buy one?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wha…?

I had Seiun Sky wait there and decided 
to pay for the mugs on my own.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wowie! Trainer-san, you're so mature! And so cool!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: To think you'd pay for my mug too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sei-chan's bond level has risen by one once again. Pirorirorin♪
choice_data_list: Well, you're in a good mood.
Well, you're in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… To say that after buying that mug for me. 
Trainer-san, you're not being honest with your feelings, are you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now then, why don't we head back home 
and drink some tea out of these mugs?
